segments.text: After the Sabbath, at dawn on the first day of the week,[^190] Mary Magdalene and the other Mary went to see the tomb.
Suddenly there was a great earthquake, for an angel of the Lord descended from heaven, rolled away the stone, and sat on it.
His appearance was like lightning, and his clothes were white as snow.
The guards trembled in fear of him and became like dead men.
But the angel said to the women,
Do not be afraid, for I know that you are looking for Jesus, who was crucified.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: He is not here; He has risen, just as He said! Come, see the place where He lay.[^191]
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Then go quickly and tell His disciples, ‘He has risen from the dead and is going ahead of you into Galilee. There you will see Him.’ See, I have told you.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: So they hurried away from the tomb in fear and great joy, and ran to tell His disciples.
Suddenly[^192] Jesus met them and said,
Greetings!
segments.speaker: Suddenly[^192]Jesus met them and

segments.text: They came to Him, grasped His feet, and worshiped Him.
Do not be afraid,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: said Jesus.
Go and tell My brothers to go to Galilee. There they will see Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: While the women were on their way, some of the guards went into the city and reported to the chief priests all that had happened.
And after the chief priests had met with the elders and formed a plan, they gave the soldiers a large sum of money
and instructed them:
You are to say, ‘His disciples came by night and stole Him away while we were asleep.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If this report reaches the governor, we will satisfy him and keep you out of trouble.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So the guards took the money and did as they were instructed. And this account has been circulated among the Jews to this very day.
Meanwhile, the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain Jesus had designated.
When they saw Him, they worshiped Him, but some doubted.
Then Jesus came to them and said,
All authority in heaven and on earth has been given to Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore go and make disciples[^193] of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Spirit,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: and teaching them to obey all that I have commanded you. And surely I am with you always, even to the end of the age.
segments.speaker: Jesus
